message.jlt_ores.hint.already_active: Auto-mine already active. Wait for the current vein to finish.
message.jlt_ores.hint.no_vein: No connected ore vein found for auto-mine.
message.jlt_ores.hint.tier_required: This %1$s needs at least a %2$s pickaxe.
message.jlt_ores.hint.durability_floor_b: Auto-mine blocked by durability floor (%s). Repair your tool before mining.
message.jlt_ores.hint.durability_trimmed: Durability floor reached: mining %s vein blocks and skipping the rest.
message.jlt_ores.hint.substitution_plann: Planned XP substitution for %s vein blocks near durability floor.
message.jlt_ores.hint.vein_durability: Not enough durability for vein auto-mine. Need %1$s, have %2$s.
message.jlt_ores.status.cancelled_distan: Auto-mine canceled: moved too far from the vein.
message.jlt_ores.status.cancelled_tool_m: Auto-mine canceled: the initiating pickaxe is no longer in your inventory.
message.jlt_ores.status.cancelled_hunger: Auto-mine canceled after hunger timeout. Eat before mining again.
message.jlt_ores.status.hunger_paused: Auto-mine paused due to hunger depletion. Eat to resume.
message.jlt_ores.status.no_substitution_: Auto-mine stopped: not enough XP for durability substitution.
message.jlt_ores.status.no_xp: Auto-mine stopped due to insufficient XP.
message.jlt_ores.status.tool_broke: Auto-mine stopped because your tool broke.
message.jlt_ores.status.durability_floor: Auto-mine stopped at durability floor (%s). Repair your tool before mining.
